_docs.match.id: e.g. minecraft:diamond, c:ores, create, epic, minecraft:.*_ingot
_docs.background.style: NONE | SOLID | TOOLTIP | TEXTURE | BANNER | FLAT
_docs.background.textureWidth/Height: custom texture dimensions (default: 256x12 for banners, 200x20 for 9-slice)
_docs.text.markup: use {name} for the item name; supports EmbersTextAPI tags
_docs.behavior.priority: higher number = higher priority when multiple tags/regex match
_docs.rarity values: common | uncommon | rare | epic (vanilla). Modded rarities also work -- use the lowercased enum name (e.g., mythic). Set log level to DEBUG to discover rarity names.
_docs.regex notes: full match against item ID; use .* for wildcards

overrides._comment: Example: shimmer effect on all ores
Example: custom color for all epic items
Example: custom popup for a modded rarity (use the lowercased enum name)
Example: prefix all ingots via regex
